rationale: No qualitative change near Romania's borders or economy this cycle; Iran stalemate and ongoing war remain background noise without fresh escalation.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal stalemate keeps mild energy price uncertainty for Romania, but no new development changes the baseline from prior cycles.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: European defence autonomy is a background concern for Romania as a NATO Black Sea member, but no immediate policy impact this cycle.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues without new escalation
top_events.summary: War near Romania's border remains ongoing but no qualitative change; Black Sea security situation unchanged from prior cycle.
